strengths: Approximately 20 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains — comfortably surpassing the 15-year minimum, with Staff-level roles at multiple companies demonstrating sustained seniority.

Actively building AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — hands-on, current work directly in the agentic AI space the role targets.

Demonstrated founder and entrepreneurial track record through GISCollective (2016–present), an open-source geo-data platform shipped to real NGO and conservation users, plus a history of community knowledge-sharing via conference talks, full-day workshops, and open-source libraries.
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field — the preferred qualifications explicitly call for this, and the candidate holds only two bachelor's degrees, neither in AI or ML.

AI infrastructure work began April 2025, making it very recent; the depth of independent AI product ownership versus contributor-level involvement in agentic tooling is not clearly established in the resume.

No explicit evidence of advising enterprise or strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption — the role requires external advisory and influence at a partner/customer level, which the resume does not surface beyond public workshops and open-source community engagement.
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings roughly two decades of polyglot, cross-domain engineering — spanning high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby, full-stack product work, cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and now active contribution to MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq — which maps directly onto the role's requirement for a builder with cloud and AI fluency. His founding of GISCollective demonstrates the entrepreneurial, 'build within ambiguity' mindset the preferred qualifications seek, and his pattern of public workshops, conference talks, and open-source tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Vibe.dav) shows an established instinct to inspire and educate beyond his immediate team. The absence of an advanced AI degree and the recency of his deepest AI work are genuine gaps relative to the preferred profile, but his practical, shipping-oriented track record in agentic AI infrastructure positions him as a strong practitioner candidate whose breadth and delivery history compensate meaningfully for the credential shortfall.
